objective: Harden generic DAG validation so provider-live node receipts require Herdr/session and visible-log binding evidence.

commands_run.command: uv run pytest tests/test_generic_dag.py tests/test_generic_provider_adapter.py tests/test_run_status.py -q
uv run ruff check src/tau_coding/generic_dag.py tests/test_generic_dag.py
uv run python -m compileall -q src/tau_coding/generic_dag.py src/tau_coding/generic_provider_adapter.py src/tau_coding/run_status.py

proves: Generic DAG provider-live node receipts without goal, attempt, workspace, pane, terminal, and visible-log fields are rejected as INVALID_RECEIPT.
Generic DAG provider-live node receipts with an existing visible log and matching visible_log_sha256 are accepted and propagated into run/inspect summaries.
The existing generic provider adapter receipt tests remain compatible with the stronger generic DAG receipt gate.
